segments.text: O Lord, my heart is not lifted up; my eyes are not raised too high; I do not occupy myself with things too great and too marvelous for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I have calmed and quieted my soul, like a weaned child with its mother; like a weaned child is my soul within me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Israel, hope in the Lord from this time forth and forevermore.
segments.speaker: David
